data.body: 9fd5 DSSE PAE: implementer (held-out from edge oracle) delivered dsse.py; happy tests green. Restored held-out suite: 12/12 GREEN. Teeth: 2 mutations (char-len PAE, decode re-serialize AC3) both caught, reverted. lint+typecheck clean. Committed 3f4174254 as stack base (rebar-ticket 9fd5, Change-Id + DCO signoff). NOTE: pre-commit needs venv on PATH + generated src/rebar/_build_info.py must be ruff-formatted or the tree-wide format-check trips.
